pi_items.verified_value: URL returns HTTP 301 redirect to https://www.dol.gov/agencies/whd/fact-sheets (HTML page, not PDF). Real FMLA Fact Sheet #28A PDFs exist at other locations (e.g., https://www.dol.gov/sites/dolgov/files/WHD/flsa/FMLA-072025.pdf) but not at the specified URL.
pi_items.source: Direct URL verification via curl -I showing 301 redirect; real FMLA documents confirmed to exist at alternative DOL URLs

privileged_info_summary: The task involves annotating a real FMLA Fact Sheet PDF from the U.S. Department of Labor. The source file is named whdfs28a (standard DOL naming convention for FMLA Employee Protections fact sheet). However, the download URL is broken—it returns a 301 redirect to an HTML page rather than delivering a PDF. Real FMLA fact sheets exist but contain different section structures than specified (e.g., 'Eligible employees' as subsection, not standalone 'ELIGIBLE EMPLOYEES' header; 'Enforcement' as subsection, not standalone section). The expected text 'Verify tenure in HRIS' is task-specific synthetic content that agents are expected to add as an annotation, not original document content.
